problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Piezoelectric. Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure directly addresses this.
